queries.question: Show all of the essays regardless of author, also show the letters written by Dr. Emily Thompson.
queries.sql:
SELECT Written_Works.Title 
FROM Written_Works JOIN Authors ON Written_Works.AuthorID = Authors.id
WHERE Written_Works.Type = 'Essay' OR Written_Works.Type = 'Letter' AND Authors.name = "Dr. Emily Thompson"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?written_works a :WrittenWorks .
  ?authors a :Author .
  ?written_works p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?written_works p:Title ?title .
  ?written_works p:Type ?type_w .
  ?written_works p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Letter" && STR(?name_w) = "Dr. Emily Thompson")))
}

queries.question: Show all of Dr. Emily Thompson's written works classed as either an essay or a letter.
queries.sql:
SELECT Written_Works.Title 
FROM Written_Works JOIN Authors ON Written_Works.AuthorID = Authors.id
WHERE (Written_Works.Type = 'Essay' OR Written_Works.Type = 'Letter') AND Authors.name = "Dr. Emily Thompson"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?written_works a :WrittenWorks .
  ?authors a :Author .
  ?written_works p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?written_works p:Title ?title .
  ?written_works p:Type ?type_w .
  ?written_works p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || STR(?type_w2) = "Letter")) && STR(?name_w) = "Dr. Emily Thompson"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all essays and letters written by Dr. Emily Thompson
